subcodes.first_line: The letter from the handmaiden Khadijih, which she had written to this servant in His presence, was mentioned before His Countenance. We beseech God, exalted be He, to strengthen her in His Cause [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نامه امتی خدیجه که بعبد حاضر نوشته بود تلقاء وجه ذکر شد نسئل الله تعالی ان یؤیدها علی الأمر
